purpose: Small MVP metadata overlay for audited high-impact products. Keys are runtime product_key/product_url values from furniture_products.

https://www.ikea.com/kr/ko/p/taernoe-tab.description: Small black and acacia outdoor table with warm wood tone and compact footprint.
evidence: name contains black acacia wood and light-brown stained terms
controlled QA surfaces it in living table and weak workspace sofa cases

https://www.ikea.com/kr/ko/p/olseroed-si.description: Compact anthracite and birch-effect side table with dark-yellow accent.
evidence: product name explicitly says side table
controlled QA surfaces it in the normal living-room table case
anthracite and dark-yellow color terms support modern/bright evidence

https://www.ikea.com/kr/ko/p/loberget-si.description: White and dark-grey compact desk chair with pad for a bright minimal workspace.
evidence: product name explicitly says desk chair and white/dark-grey
controlled QA repeatedly surfaces it for workspace chair requests

evidence: audited category is chair but semantic role is storage/support

evidence: product name says two-seat sofa and dark grey
controlled weak workspace sofa case should remain weak on room fit
